# Sample item bank for tests

## Week 1: Threat Modeling
1. What does STRIDE stand for? a) A design pattern · b) A mnemonic for threat categories ✓ · c) A test framework · d) An encryption mode
2. What is a trust boundary? a) A network firewall rule · b) A point where privilege changes ✓ · c) A password policy · d) A CI/CD gate

## Week 4: Injection
1. What makes SQL injection possible? a) Weak passwords · b) Unparameterized queries with user input ✓ · c) Missing HTTPS · d) Slow queries
